title: Omnium OMS Connector Configuration
description: Configuration used by the Omnium OMS Connector for statuses, shipment methods, tender types, rewards, and transactions.

OrderStatusMapping.description: Order Status mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

TenderIdMapping.description: TenderId mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

ShipmentMethodMapping.description: Shipment Method mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

ShipmentStatusMapping.description: Shipment Status mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

RewardTypeMapping.description: Reward Type mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

TransactionTypeMapping.description: Transaction Type mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

AuthorizationStatusMapping.description: Authorization Status mapping for Omnium and HiiRetail Customer Order.

TenderWithoutAuthorizationData.description: List of tender types that do not require authorization data during processing.
